title: werauhia verrucosa
intro: Werauhia verrucosa, also known as the rough bromeliad, is a species of air plant in the bromeliad family (Bromeliaceae) native to Brazil. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and wounds. The health benefits of Werauhia verrucosa include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it in a tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
